creator: cgull@smoke.marlboro.vt.us
text:
sysinstall appears to unmount the fixit floppy *after* prompting
	the user to remove it.

Fix: 

move a few lines of code :)
How-To-Repeat: 
	boot install floppy, run fixit shell, ^D, <return>.  note that the
	floppy swishes and gurgles at this point, not before the last prompt.
	also flip over to diagnostic screen and note fd0 errors, if you have
	removed the floppy when prompted.
